# arslnb.com AI-readable Index

- Zeus docs overview: https://arslnb.com/zeus/docs/
- Zeus docs llms map: https://arslnb.com/zeus/docs/llms.txt
- Zeus docs JSON index: https://arslnb.com/zeus/docs/agent-index.json
- Zeus plugin directory: https://arslnb.com/plugins/
- Zeus plugin registry repo: https://github.com/arslnb/zeus-plugins
